hero.subtitle: FocusFlow brings Kanban boards, Scrum sprints, whiteboards, diagrams, and AI together in one beautiful workspace — so your team can ship faster.

features.heading: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: From ideation to delivery — all the tools your team needs in one place.

kanban.title: Kanban Boards
kanban.description: Organize work visually with drag-and-drop cards, columns, and real-time updates.

scrum.title: Scrum & Sprints
scrum.description: Plan sprints, track velocity, and manage backlogs with built-in Scrum tools.

whiteboards.title: Whiteboards
whiteboards.description: Sketch ideas and brainstorm with collaborative infinite canvas whiteboards.

diagrams.title: Diagrams
diagrams.description: Create flowcharts, architecture diagrams, and user flows with React Flow.

ai.title: AI Chat Assistant
ai.description: Break down tasks, get suggestions, and speed up planning with AI-powered chat.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Invite members, assign tasks, and collaborate in real-time across workspaces.

cta.heading: Ready to get focused?
cta.subtitle: Join teams who ship faster with FocusFlow. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.
